options.name: tags

options.name: framework
options.description: The target framework hint to use for all cross-targeting projects with multiple TFMs. This value must be a valid target framework for each individual cross-targeting project. Non-crosstargeting projects will ignore this hint and the value TFM configured in tye.yaml will override this hint.

options.name: port
options.description: The port to run control plane on.

options.name: logs
options.description: Write structured application logs to the specified log provider. Supported providers are 'console', 'elastic' (Elasticsearch), 'ai' (ApplicationInsights), 'seq'.

options.name: dtrace
options.description: Write distributed traces to the specified tracing provider. Supported providers are 'zipkin'.

options.name: metrics
options.description: Write metrics to the specified metrics provider.

options.name: debug
options.description: Wait for debugger attach to specific service. Specify "*" to wait for all services.

options.name: docker
options.description: Run projects as docker containers.

options.name: dashboard
options.description: Launch dashboard on run.

options.name: watch
options.description: Watches for code changes for all dotnet projects.
